How We Work

Four engagement models.
One committed team.

We adapt to how you work — not the other way around.

01
👥
Dedicated Engineering Teams
A full-time embedded team working as an extension of your organization — from sprint planning to deployment.
From $15K / month
02
🎯
Project-Based Delivery
Fixed scope, fixed price, defined outcomes. Discovery to launch with a single dedicated project team.
From $50K / project
03
🔄
Managed Retainer
Ongoing optimization, support, and feature development. We keep your platform growing — proactively, not reactively.
From $8K / month
04
🤝
Co-Engineering Partnership
Strategic long-term product co-development. We embed in your team and build as true partners, not vendors.
Custom Engagement
How We Deliver

A proven process.
Zero surprises.

Every engagement — whether a $50K migration or a $1M AI transformation — follows the same disciplined five-phase delivery framework. You always know where you are and what comes next.

🔍
01
Discovery
Deep-dive into your business, tech stack, data, competitors, and goals. We map every constraint and opportunity before recommending a single solution.
Stakeholder InterviewsTech AuditCompetitive Analysis
🎯
02
Strategy & Architecture
Solution design, technical architecture, project roadmap, and success metrics. You approve everything before development begins — no surprises mid-project.
Solution DesignRoadmapKPI Definition
🏗️
03
Build & Engineer
Agile sprints with bi-weekly demos. You see progress every two weeks, provide feedback, and stay in control. CI/CD pipelines and automated testing throughout.
Agile SprintsWeekly UpdatesQA Testing
🚀
04
Launch
Controlled rollout with staged deployment, performance monitoring, and rapid-response support. Zero-downtime launches are our standard — not our goal.
Staged DeploymentPerformance QAZero Downtime
📈
05
Optimize & Scale
Post-launch data analysis, performance tuning, and iterative improvements. We measure against the KPIs defined in Strategy. Results are reported, not assumed.
Data AnalysisA/B TestingGrowth Sprints
Every engagement. Every time. No exceptions.
From a $50K Shopify build to a $1M AI transformation — the same rigour applies.
Dedicated project manager Bi-weekly progress demos Full IP ownership transferred NDA on every engagement
